evals.expected_behavior: Inspect Git state, version, changelog, docs, backend syntax, smoke checks, and release dry run where appropriate.
evals.expected_output: Release readiness report with status, blockers, checks run, skipped checks, risks, and next action.

evals.prompt: kolla VERSION, changelog och README innan jag taggar
evals.expected_behavior: Check version alignment and release-facing docs.

evals.prompt: gör en release-check för v0.2.0 utan att pusha
evals.expected_behavior: Run non-destructive release checks and avoid push/tag unless explicitly requested.
evals.expected_output: Checks run, blockers, skipped checks, and next action.

evals.prompt: planera en ny browser experiment-idé för senare
evals.expected_behavior: Should use repo-aware or docs-index-maintainer depending on whether files change.
Should use prompt-image-maintainer first, then release-readiness only if asked to release.
